news.news: Novartis announced that the FORTITUDE Phase I/II study of del-brax (delpacibart braxlosiran) met its primary biomarker endpoint in patients with facioscapulohumeral muscular dystrophy (FSHD). The investigational antibody oligonucleotide conjugate (AOC) showed significant reductions in DUX4-regulated biomarkers, validating the dosing regimen for the ongoing Phase III trial.
